changes: Shake It Off: Barrier damage absorption increased from 12% to 15% of maximum HP.
Foul: Potency reduction after the first enemy is now fixed at 25%.
Bio III: Damage over time potency reduced from 50 to 45.
Miasma III: Potency reduced from 50 to 45. Damage over time potency reduced from 50 to 45.
Fleche: Potency increased from 420 to 440.
Contre Sixte: Potency increased from 380 to 400. Potency is no longer reduced after the first enemy.
Enhanced Jolt: Increase to Verthunder and Veraero potency changed from 350 to 370.
Afflatus Misery: Potency reduction after the first enemy is now fixed at 25%.
A Meditation Gauge has been added.
Holy Spirit: Potency has been increased from 1,600 to 1,800.
Intervention: Recast time has been reduced from 30 to 15 seconds.
Testudo: Barrier strength has been increased from a heal potency of 2,500 to 3,000.
Onslaught: Potency has been increased from 1,000 to 1,200.
Shake It Off: Barrier strength while under the effect of Rampart has been increased from 3,000 to 4,000.
Holmgang: Effect duration has been reduced from 4 to 3 seconds.

Nascent Flash: Portion of damage absorbed as HP by Nascent Flash effect has been increased from 50% to 100%. Nascent Glint effect now reduces target's damage taken by 10%. Recast time has been reduced from 30 to 15 seconds.
Edge of Shadow: Duration of effect reducing target's HP recovered by healing actions has been reduced from 10 to 6 seconds.
Flood of Shadow: Duration of effect reducing target's HP recovered by healing actions has been reduced from 10 to 6 seconds.
The Blackest Night: MP cost has been reduced from 2,500 to 0.
Bow Shock: The additional effect 'Removes all Regen and barrier effects from targets' has been added. The additional effect 'Heavy +50%' has been removed.

Aurora: Now restores target's HP with a cure potency of 3,000. Recast time has been reduced from 30 to 15 seconds. The additional effect 'Creates a barrier around target that absorbs damage equivalent to a heal of 2,000 potency' has been removed.

Heart of Light: The additional effect 'When under the effect of Brutal Shell, its effect is doubled and granted to nearby party members' has been added. The additional effect 'Creates a barrier around self and nearby party members that absorbs damage equivalent to a heal of 1,000 potency' has been removed.
Gnashing Fang: The additional effect 'Absorbs 50% of damage dealt as HP' has been removed.
Savage Claw: The additional effect 'Absorbs 50% of damage dealt as HP' has been removed.
Wicked Talon: The additional effect 'Absorbs 50% of damage dealt as HP' has been removed.
Burst Strike: Potency has been reduced from 2,000 to 1,800. Portion of damage absorbed as HP has been increased from 50% to 100%.
Fated Circle: Portion of damage absorbed as HP has been increased from 50% to 100%.
Jugular Rip: Potency has been increased from 600 to 800.
Abdomen Tear: Potency has been increased from 600 to 800.
Eye Gouge: Potency has been increased from 600 to 800.
Riddle of Earth: Barrier strength has been reduced from a heal potency of 3,000 to 2,000.
Axe Kick: Recast time has been reduced from 45 to 30 seconds.
Tornado Kick: Potency has been reduced from 2,000 to 1,800.
The Forbidden Chakra: Potency has been reduced from 2,000 to 1,800.
Piercing Talon: Range has been reduced from 20 to 15 yalms.
High Jump: Potency has been increased from 1,600 to 2,000.
Spineshatter Dive: Potency has been increased from 600 to 800. The additional effect 'Reduces the recast time of Mirage Dive by 15 seconds' has been added.
Mirage Dive: Potency has been increased from 800 to 1,200.
Geirskogul: Potency has been reduced from 2,000 to 1,600.
Nastrond: Potency has been reduced from 2,400 to 2,000.
Life Surge: Increase to potency has been changed from 20% to 50%.
Hyosho Ranryu: Potency has been reduced from 2,400 to 2,000.
Goka Mekkyaku: Potency has been reduced from 1,600 to 1,200. Range has been reduced from 25 to 15 yalms.
Bunshin: Melee attack potency has been increased from 600 to 1,000. Area attack potency has been increased from 400 to 600. Ranged attack potency has been increased from 400 to 800.
Shukuchi: Barrier strength has been increased from a heal potency of 1,000 to 2,000.

Shoha: Maximum stacks of Meditation has been reduced from 5 to 3. Potency with 1 stack of Meditation has been increased from 600 to 800. Potency with 2 stacks of Meditation has been increased from 1,200 to 1,600. Potency with 3 stacks of Meditation has been increased from 1,800 to 2,400.
Burst Shot: Potency has been increased from 1,000 to 1,200.

Pitch Perfect: Potency with 1 stack of Repertoire has been increased from 400 to 600. Potency with 2 stacks of Repertoire has been increased from 800 to 1,200. Potency with 3 stacks of Repertoire has been increased from 1,200 to 1,800.
Repelling Shot: Increase to Soul Voice Gauge has been changed from 10 to 20.
Nature's Minne: Increase to HP recovery has been reduced from 20% to 10%. Effect duration has been increased from 10 to 15 seconds. Recast time has been reduced from 45 to 30 seconds.
Heated Split Shot: Potency has been increased from 800 to 1,000.
Heated Slug Shot: Potency has been increased from 1,000 to 1,200.
Heated Clean Shot: Potency has been increased from 1,200 to 1,400.
Heat Blast: Potency has been increased from 1,000 to 1,200.
Gauss Round: Potency has been increased from 800 to 1,000.
Ricochet: Potency has been reduced from 800 to 600.
Bioblaster: Potency has been increased from 1,000 to 1,400.
Blank: The additional effect 'If target is suffering from a Wildfire effect inflicted by you, Blank potency is tripled' has been added.
Tactician: Recast time has been reduced from 60 to 45 seconds.
Saber Dance: Effect duration has been reduced from 30 to 15 seconds.
Fan Dance III: Effect duration has been reduced from 30 to 15 seconds.

Standard Finish: Potency for 0 steps has been changed from 400-800 to 200-600. Potency for 1 step has been changed from 600-1,200 to 400-1,200. Potency for 2 steps has been changed from 800-1,600 to 600-1,800.

Technical Finish: Potency for 0 steps has been changed from 400-800 to 200-600. Potency for 1 step has been changed from 600-1,200 to 400-1,200. Potency for 2 steps has been changed from 800-1,600 to 600-1,800. Potency for 3 steps has been changed from 1,000-2,000 to 800-2,400. Potency for 4 steps has been changed from 1,200-2,400 to 1,000-3,000.
Blizzard: Potency has been increased from 600 to 800.
Blizzard IV: Potency has been increased from 1,200 to 1,600.
Flare: Potency has been increased from 1,600 to 1,800.
Freeze: Potency has been increased from 800 to 1,200.
Energy Drain: Potency has been increased from 600 to 800.
Corps-a-corps: The additional effect 'Heavy +50%' has been added, with a duration of 5 seconds.
Displacement: The additional effect 'Bind' has been added, with a duration of 3 seconds.

Vercure: Cure potency has been increased from 2,000 to 3,000. The additional effect 'Increases both Black Mana and White Mana by 5 when used to restore HP of self or a party member while in combat' has been added.
Embolden (Added): Increases damage dealt by self and nearby party members by 10%. Effect is reduced by 2% every 3s. Duration: 15s.
Tether (Removed)
Afflatus Solace: Regen potency has been reduced from 800 to 600.
Afflatus Rapture: Regen potency has been reduced from 400 to 300.
Physick: The additional effect 'Increases Faerie Gauge by 10 when action is used to restore HP of self or a party member while in combat' has been added.
Adloquium: The additional effect 'Increases Faerie Gauge by 10 when action is used to restore HP of self or a party member while in combat' has been added.
Succor: The additional effect 'Increases Faerie Gauge by 5 for each party member healed when used to restore HP of self or a party member while in combat' has been added.
Broil III: Increase to Faerie Gauge has been changed from 10 to 20.
Biolysis: Increase to Faerie Gauge has been changed from 10 to 20.
Indomitability: Now shares a recast timer with Lustrate. Maximum charges has been increased from 2 to 3. Recast time has been reduced from 30 to 15 seconds.
Excogitation: Recast time has been reduced from 45 to 30 seconds.
Focalization: Recast time has been reduced from 60 to 45 seconds.
Lustrate: Now shares a recast timer with Indomitability.
Aura Blast: Potency has been increased from 1,000 to 1,600. Recast time has been reduced from 45 to 30 seconds. The additional effect '10-yalm knockback' has been removed.
Dissipation (Added): Increases healing potency by 50%. Duration: 6s. Reduces the recast time of both Lustrate and Indomitability by 15s. Faerie Gauge Cost: 50.
Summon Seraph (Removed)
Seraphic Veil (Removed)
Gravity: Potency has been changed from 600-3,000 to 800-3,200. Cast time has been reduced from 2 to 1.5 seconds. Recast time has been reduced from 45 to 30 seconds.
Essential Dignity: Cure potency has been changed from 2,000-4,000 to 2,500-5,000.

new_content.name: Cinder Drift (Extreme)
new_content.description: An extreme version of the new trial.

new_content.name: Ruby Doomsday
new_content.description: Chronicles of a New Era quest.

new_content.name: Away with the Faerie
new_content.description: Chronicles of a New Era quest.

new_content.name: Carnivals and Confrontations
new_content.description: Chronicles of a New Era quest.

new_content.name: All the Fish in the Sea
Ocean Fishing
new_content.description: Content for fishers to sail on the Endeavor.

new_content.name: Materia Extraction
new_content.description: System to extract materia from spiritbound gear without losing the item.

new_content.name: Calculations Feature
new_content.description: Feature in the crafting window to view expected progress and quality increases.

housing.name: Half-timbered Cottage Walls
housing.description: A set of four walls designed for those who wish to transform their estate into a quaint mercantile establishment. ※Can only be used with cottages on small plots of land.

housing.name: Half-timbered House Walls
housing.description: A set of four walls designed for those who wish to transform their estate into a quaint mercantile establishment. ※Can only be used with houses on medium plots of land.

housing.name: Half-timbered Mansion Walls
housing.description: A set of four walls designed for those who wish to transform their estate into a quaint mercantile establishment. ※Can only be used with mansions on large plots of land.

housing.name: Rough Stone Interior Wall
housing.description: An imposing interior wall of haphazardly arranged hunks of stone.

housing.name: Rough Stone Flooring
housing.description: Unpolished flagstone─for everyone's favorite seedy tavern ambience.

housing.name: Wooden Chandelier
housing.description: Ideal for swinging on with roguish grace─though do try not to burn the place down.

housing.name: Dohn Trellis
housing.description: Make even the Fae jealous with the trellises designed to evoke Dohn Mheg.

housing.name: Lakeland Elf Tree
housing.description: Elf trees are in such high demand that some are grown for the express purpose of being cut down and sold.

housing.name: Lakeland Flower Garden
housing.description: Lakeland's most arresting flowers right in your own home.

housing.name: Brick Garden Wall
housing.description: A portion of brick wall that would complement nearly any garden, be it full of flowers or full of more subdued plant life.

housing.name: Cosmos Partition
housing.description: A partition design to evoke the grandeur and magnificence of the Grand Cosmos.

housing.name: White Screen
housing.description: That this screen always maintains its sterling whiteness speaks to the quality of its construction.

housing.name: Steppe Bed
housing.description: Sleep as soundly as the nomadic peoples of the Azim Steppe do.

housing.name: Bomb Cauldron
housing.description: Crafted with painstaking attention to detail, put this cauldron in any room to terrify guests and pets alike.

housing.name: Ronkan Rocking Chair
housing.description: A rocking chair representing Ronkan resourcefulness and resilience.

housing.name: Crystallized Coral
housing.description: This crystallized mass of coral matches almost any color scheme one could imagine.

housing.name: Cheese Collection
housing.description: Why in the gods' name would a person amass such an amount of cheese? A peculiar obsession? A craving that transcends all reason? Some manner of cheese-related divination known only to a forbidden sect? Whatever the reason, one can only hope that the results are still saleable.

housing.name: Used Banquet Table
housing.description: There's no telling how many banquets have been eaten off of this table.

housing.name: Wine Rack
housing.description: Nice vintage you've got there. Be a shame if someone were to...quaff it.

housing.name: Cardpaper Box
housing.description: Not recommended for subterfuge.

housing.name: Golden Crystal Boule
housing.description: A mounted sample of the luminous yellow crystals that grow uninhibited on the sea floor.

housing.name: Sunflower Bouquet
housing.description: A bouquet sure to brighten any room it is in.

housing.name: Cutting Board
housing.description: Perfect for cutting all manner of vegetables on. Also suitable for placing already cut vegetables on.

housing.name: Open Book
housing.description: Opened to the page revealing the most impressively wordy words entirely by accident.

housing.name: Milk Carton
housing.description: A paper milk carton, fortunately lacking an illustration of someone's face on the side.

housing.name: Dishware
housing.description: A full set of dishes, washed and all.

housing.name: Cosmetics Box
housing.description: This enormous case is replete with enough paints and powders to satisfy an entire Eorzean theater troupe─or one Eulmoran dame.

housing.name: Dish Rack
housing.description: A spacious box in which to dry dishware, with accompanying mat for glasses.

housing.name: Folded Futon
housing.description: Put it away─quick, before the guests see!

housing.name: The Bismarck
housing.description: Impressive enough to bear the name of Limsa's premier culinary establishment as its own, this is the sort of sandwich one eats off of a nice plate.

housing.name: Picnic Basket
housing.description: Includes everything required for a sunlit meal in the outdoors.

housing.name: First Chair's Trumpet
housing.description: Designed in homage to a legendary trumpeter, its majesty may someday inspire someone to finally pick up that instrument they have been meaning to learn.

housing.name: Siphon Coffee Brewer
housing.description: Many a connoisseur have sworn off all other methods of making coffee after trying a single sip of a cup made with this one.

housing.name: Ruby Weapon Bust
housing.description: The heart of this Garlond Ironworks scale replica of a select portion of the Ruby Weapon pulsates menacingly. Accept no substitutes.

housing.name: Small Angler's Canvas
housing.description: A tiny blank canvas on which an ink print of some aquatic creature or another might be rendered, complete with frame.

housing.name: Medium Angler's Canvas
housing.description: A modest blank canvas on which an ink print of some aquatic creature or another might be rendered, complete with frame.

housing.name: Large Angler's Canvas
housing.description: A robust blank canvas on which an ink print of some aquatic creature or another might be rendered, complete with frame.

housing.name: Extra Large Angler's Canvas
housing.description: An imposing blank canvas on which an ink print of a truly enormous aquatic creature might be rendered, complete with frame.

housing.name: Amaurot Wall Lamp
housing.description: A metallic fixture of the sort popular in the Amaurot of Emet-Selch's recollection.

housing.name: Cosmos Decoration
housing.description: Be transported to the majestic Grand Cosmos without stepping foot from your room.

housing.name: Oldrose Wall Planter
housing.description: A riot of vibrant red and pale pink blooms within this quaint wall-mounted box.

housing.name: Fat Cat Wall Chronometer
housing.description: This convenient timekeeping device will always remind you when it is time to eat, or maybe when it is time to put down that third dessert.

glamour.name: The Emperor's New Shield
glamour.description: Invisible glamour item for the shield slot.
